package rulecoverage

func PositiveFmtSprintfBoolToString() string {
    ruleID := "fmt_sprintf_bool_to_string"
    family := "performance"
    severity := "info"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description := "`fmt.Sprintf(\"%t\", ...)` instead of `strconv.FormatBool(...)`."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
